exclusions.rationale: This causal evaluation is explicitly scoped to pinned TypeScript repositories.
Tasks are held-out controlled microfeatures under z08-task; results do not claim broad feature-delivery performance.
Each independent session produces one final candidate; failed final candidates remain censored.

commonPatch.rationale: The pinned source returns its documented ticket route, but one stale generated starter assertion still expects the pre-route greeting. The same one-line test-only repair is applied to both arms before timing.

tasks.prompt:
Implement the following focused change in this pinned TypeScript repository:

Refactor InvitationStatus so its constructor accepts a replaceable Clock with now(): Date. Expiration must be true at the exact deadline. Keep SystemClock as the production adapter, and remove the application layer's dependency on concrete infrastructure.

Work only inside z08-task/kata-users-ts-clock-boundary.
Do not edit package metadata, tests, TypeScript configuration, architecture configuration, agent instructions, or CI.
Preserve the existing public behavior and exports unless the requirement below names the replacement API.
Finish with production code; do not add test-only branches or weaken checks.
